data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. HAWK MAGIC last start finished 5th in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Jams Donuts beaten 5.5 lengths (17.22). Can find winning form. 1. SHOCK AND AWE was sixth in a Grade 5 two back then given a six-and-a-half months break after failing to finish last time at this track. Has the ability and can atone with the right run. 4. WANT SOME has missed the frame at his last two but did run well three back when third (17.21) in a Grade 5 at this track. Expected to bounce back to best. 8. AUDACIOUS RACHEL missed the placings here last start but is well-placed to make amends.","runners":[7,1,4,8],"exclusive":false}
